content: HA add-on options schema types: str, bool, int, float, email, url, password, port, match(regex), list(val1|val2) for enum select, device/device(filter). Optional: append ? to type. Constraints: int(min,max), str(min,max). Lists of primitives: [str] for arrays of strings. Nested dicts up to depth 2. UI auto-renders appropriate controls per type (toggle for bool, password field for password, dropdown for list). Config UI updates on add-on restart only.
